{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = World Spirit of Zykaros
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[World Spirit of Zykaros]] is an enemy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47">''The Pilot'', chapter 47</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Our enemy is the World Spirit of Zykaros!”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
